title: Magic Sword heals equipped creature ten HP on equip

card.rawText: On equip, heal this creature 10 HP. Atk: +2. Hit: +2.

plan.title: Magic Sword heals equipped creature ten HP on equip
plan.summary: Equip Magic Sword to a damaged creature and verify the printed 10 HP heal resolves once on equip.

notes: Place test_creature_hp100 on player_1 field as primary.
Set current HP to 80 before equip.

steps: Player 1 plays Magic Sword and equips it to the damaged primary creature.

expectedAssertions.label: Equipped creature healed by exactly 10 HP

manualVerification: Confirm the heal resolves only on equip and does not repeat later.
riskNotes: The setup needs a pre-damaged primary creature before equip resolves.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
